zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期偏向震荡]
zh.content:
当前以太坊/美元价格在2314.52附近，整体表现为震荡整理。价格在2320.07和2312.41区间波动，尚未显现明确的上涨或下跌趋势。虽然24小时内变动较小，涨幅仅为0.05%，但该区间的震荡可能意味着市场暂时处于观望状态。

技术指标方面，RSI(14)暂时没有数据，难以准确评估超买或超卖情况。MACD当前为负值(-0.3107)，且信号线未给出明确的方向指示，显示市场可能处于弱势调整状态。SMA(20)为2287.89，表明短期内价格的支撑位在此附近。

支撑位在2312.41，而阻力位则在2320.07。若价格突破2320.07，则有可能迎来短期反弹；反之，若跌破2312.41，则可能进一步测试2287.89的支撑位。短期内，建议保持谨慎观望，适当把握突破时机。

考虑到当前震荡行情，建议投资者耐心等待明确的突破信号，避免在无趋势的情况下过度交易。若价格突破2320.07，考虑短期看多；若跌破2312.41，可考虑轻仓做空。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum has shown relative stability in the short term, trading around $2314.50 with only marginal 24-hour movement. The price has been oscillating just above the 20-day simple moving average at $2287.89, indicating mild bullish momentum. While the intraday high of $2320.07 suggests some resistance near current levels, the low of $2312.41 marks a short-term support zone. Overall, the trend appears cautiously upward, with sideways consolidation dominating the near-term price action.  

The MACD reading of -0.31 hints at residual bearish pressure, despite prices holding above the 20-day SMA. Without the signal line or RSI data, momentum assessment is incomplete, but the negative MACD suggests sellers are slightly more dominant than buyers in this window. Traders should monitor for a MACD crossover or divergence to confirm any shift toward stronger bullish trends. Given the lack of volatility, momentum indicators may soon provide a clearer directional signal.  

Immediate support can be identified at $2310, slightly below the recent intraday low, while resistance sits near $2325–$2330, marking a potential breakout zone if bullish momentum strengthens. A sustained move above this level could invite larger position entries, whereas failure to hold support near $2310 might trigger minor retracements toward the $2300 psychological level. Price action within this narrow range suggests a period of consolidation before any decisive trend continuation.  

From a tactical perspective, short-term traders could consider range-bound strategies, buying near support and taking profits around resistance, while keeping stops tight to mitigate sudden swings. Longer-term participants may use the current consolidation as an accumulation window, focusing on trend shifts signaled by the SMA and MACD convergence. Patience is key, as Ethereum’s current behavior indicates low volatility, offering measured opportunities rather than aggressive breakout plays.
